title: Top IRS lawyer to resign amid disputes with the administration
summary: Reports point to a contested settlement deal and disagreements over tax audits behind the departure of the agency's chief counsel.

title: Speaker's government-funding gambit: an early vote on a stopgap bill
summary: House leadership wants a conspicuously early vote on a short-term funding bill — more than two months before the government would run out of money.

title: House Republicans' $95 billion package clears its first hurdle
summary: A $95 billion spending package tied to defense and other priorities advanced past an initial procedural vote in the House.

title: GOP angst persists over $95 billion reconciliation package
summary: A leadership pitch did little to ease House Republican concerns over the reconciliation package ahead of a planned floor vote next week.

title: Deportation push is rewiring American policing, ACLU report says
summary: A new ACLU report says immigration enforcement has expanded beyond ICE, drawing federal agents, state troopers and local police into a roughly 50,000-person internal enforcement force.

title: Administration reverses DHS pause on ICE vehicle stops
summary: The White House reversed a Homeland Security decision to pause the kind of ICE vehicle stops that had led to two fatal shootings.

title: Nonprofit is feeding lawmakers model legislation, report finds
summary: An investigation describes an outside nonprofit drafting and circulating model legislation to members of Congress, raising questions about influence over lawmaking.
